regions.text: Machines work for us, but they cannot decide what work should be done. Humans must provide the direction.
People need to know when and why to do things. A machine only does what it's made for. (Illustration: A sequence showing the voting process).
Free people must make up their own minds. We learn to think by watching and talking to others. Early education is vital.
should: what is best for man. direction: giving orders and being responsible for the outcome.
